description_long: This is a large, round plate with a thick, cylindrical profile and a slightly recessed top surface. The plate is primarily a warm terracotta color, with a smooth, matte finish that resembles ceramic or stoneware. The top surface features an ornate, circular decorative pattern in green, red, and white, reminiscent of Mediterranean or Moorish tilework, with symmetrical floral and geometric motifs. The sides are plain and unadorned, emphasizing the contrast with the intricate top. The plate appears robust and heavy, suitable for serving or as a decorative centerpiece in an urban outdoor or indoor setting. Its substantial height and diameter suggest it could also function as a low pedestal or display base.
description: A large, terracotta-colored round plate with a thick profile and ornate green, red, and white decorative pattern on top. The sides are plain, and the plate has a smooth, matte finish.
description_view_0: The plate is seen from a slightly elevated angle, showing the full decorative pattern on the top and the plain cylindrical side.
description_view_1: The plate is rotated, revealing more of the right side and a partial view of the top pattern, with the central motif still visible.
description_view_2: The plate is further rotated, showing the left side and a different segment of the top pattern, with the central motif slightly off-center.
description_view_3: The plate is rotated to display the back side, with the decorative pattern partially visible and the plain side prominent.
attribute_visibility_of_markings_or_insc: Decorative patterns are visible on the top surface, featuring geometric and floral motifs in green, red, and white.
